Confirmed text matches full duration including the narrative prologue (English) and the song (Japanese), using on-screen text as ground truth for timing and transcription.

subtitles.original: Long ago, the Heavenly Realm was governed
subtitles.english: Long ago, the Heavenly Realm was governed

subtitles.original: by the gods of light and order.
subtitles.english: by the gods of light and order.

subtitles.original: The Human Realm, the Demon Realm,
subtitles.english: The Human Realm, the Demon Realm,

subtitles.original: and the Heavenly Realm.
subtitles.english: and the Heavenly Realm.

subtitles.original: All worlds were kept in balance
subtitles.english: All worlds were kept in balance

subtitles.original: by the Celestial Lake of Light.
subtitles.english: by the Celestial Lake of Light.

subtitles.original: A sacred "law" forbade any from entering
subtitles.english: A sacred "law" forbade any from entering

subtitles.original: the lake or sullying its waters.
subtitles.english: the lake or sullying its waters.

subtitles.original: The goddess Kronii was spending her days
subtitles.english: The goddess Kronii was spending her days

subtitles.original: joyfully in the heavens.
subtitles.english: joyfully in the heavens.

subtitles.original: A mischievous girl, today too
subtitles.english: A mischievous girl, today too

subtitles.original: she was chasing after her friends,
subtitles.english: she was chasing after her friends,

subtitles.original: playing pranks and teasing them.
subtitles.english: playing pranks and teasing them.

subtitles.original: She was a bit of a scatterbrained deity.
subtitles.english: She was a bit of a scatterbrained deity.

subtitles.original: Another beautiful day... Weather like this
subtitles.english: Another beautiful day... Weather like this

subtitles.original: really makes me want to sing!
subtitles.english: really makes me want to sing!

subtitles.original: せまいせまいあなぼこで
subtitles.english: Inside a cramped, narrow hole

subtitles.original: 夢を見せあうぼくたちは
subtitles.english: The two of us show each other our dreams

subtitles.original: あの世もこの世もいられない
subtitles.english: We can't be in that world; neither can we be in this world

subtitles.original: あの世もこの世もいられない
subtitles.english: We can't be in that world; neither can we be in this world

subtitles.original: ああ神様 子どもの神様
subtitles.english: Dear God, child god

subtitles.original: ぼくらはあなたの遊んだ
subtitles.english: We are in your sandbox,

subtitles.original: 砂場の中ですり傷だらけです
subtitles.english: covered in scratches

subtitles.original: タタタ･･･
subtitles.english: Ta-ta-ta...

subtitles.original: 踊るよ 回るよ
subtitles.english: We're dancing, we're spinning

subtitles.original: 僕らの踊りはおかしな踊り
subtitles.english: Our dance is a strange dance

subtitles.original: 踊ったつもりで 笑ったつもりで
subtitles.english: Intending to dance, intending to laugh

subtitles.original: 倒れたつもりで 叫んだつもりで
subtitles.english: Intending to collapse, intending to shout

subtitles.original: 目がふらふら 音もふにゃふにゃ
subtitles.english: Eyes are dizzy, sounds are mushy

subtitles.original: 足もふらふら まもるしふにゃふにゃ
subtitles.english: Feet are dizzy, protective charms are mushy

subtitles.original: 太陽も月も 空も神様も生み出して
subtitles.english: The sun and the moon, the sky and the gods, all born

subtitles.original: あなぐらぐらしは抜け出せない
subtitles.english: Hole-dwelling is inescapable

subtitles.original: 抜け出せない 抜け出せないから
subtitles.english: Can't get out, because we can't get out

subtitles.original: 抜け出さない
subtitles.english: So we don't get out

subtitles.original: 抜け出さないからお目々閉じて
subtitles.english: So we don't get out, close your eyes

subtitles.original: ああ 落ちて 落ちて 落ちてゆくよ
subtitles.english: Falling, falling, falling away

subtitles.original: あなぐらぐらしのうそのなか
subtitles.english: Inside the vortex of "Hole-Dwelling"

subtitles.original: 落ちて 落ちて 落ちてゆくよ
subtitles.english: Falling, falling, falling away

subtitles.original: いっしょになかよくどこまでも
subtitles.english: Together, getting along, everywhere

subtitles.original: おんなじ おんなじ おんなじじゃないか
subtitles.english: Same, same, isn't it the same?

subtitles.original: きみとぼくとはいつまでも
subtitles.english: You and I, forever

subtitles.original: おんなじ おんなじ おんなじじゃないか
subtitles.english: Same, same, isn't it the same?

subtitles.original: いけない いけない
subtitles.english: It's forbidden, it's forbidden...

subtitles.original: さみしい さみしい
subtitles.english: it's lonely, it's lonely.
